Veterans Benefits: Maine offers income-tax treatment for military retirement pay, veteran property-tax exemptions, motor-vehicle excise relief for qualifying disabled veterans, emergency financial assistance, education and employment support, and recreation/license benefits through the Bureau of Maine Veterans' Services.
LGBTQSource: MAP Maine Equality Profile 2026; no Bath HRC MEI coverage found
Description: Coastal Kennebec River city known as the City of Ships, anchored by Bath Iron Works naval shipbuilding and the Maine Maritime Museum. Bath offers strong maritime culture, nearby VA outpatient access in Lewiston, coastal parks and water recreation, and low violent-crime rates, with cold snowy winters and housing costs above the national baseline as key tradeoffs.
